title: Cyber Security
description: Cyber Security specialists protect computers, networks, servers, and data from malicious digital attacks. They identify system vulnerabilities, monitor for breaches, and implement robust security protocols.

topics.name: Computer Networks & Protocols
topics.description: Learn the OSI model, TCP/IP suite, DNS, DHCP, routing, switching, and common ports.

topics.name: Linux Command Line & Admin
topics.description: Master command-line operations, directory navigation, file permissions, shell scripting, and service management in Linux.

topics.name: Windows Systems Administration
topics.description: Understand Active Directory, Registry settings, event logs, Group Policy, and PowerShell basics.

semesters.semester: Semester 2: Security Principles & Web App Security

topics.name: Cryptography Fundamentals
topics.description: Learn symmetric vs. asymmetric encryption, hashing (SHA-256), digital signatures, and SSL/TLS certificates.

topics.name: OWASP Top 10 Web Vulnerabilities
topics.description: Understand web flaws: SQL Injection, XSS, CSRF, broken authentication, and insecure design.

topics.name: Security Scripting (Python / Bash)
topics.description: Write scripts to automate scanning, parse logs, test APIs, and perform simple automated network requests.

topics.name: Vulnerability Scanning & Reconnaissance
topics.description: Perform scanning and active/passive information gathering using tools like Nmap, Shodan, and Subfinder.

topics.name: Penetration Testing Methodology
topics.description: Learn systematic hacking phases: planning, scanning, gaining access (Metasploit), maintaining access, and reporting.

topics.name: Privilege Escalation
topics.description: Understand how to identify misconfigurations in Linux and Windows to escalate privileges from user to root/administrator.

topics.name: Security Operations (SIEM & Log Auditing)
topics.description: Analyze system events, firewall logs, and build threat detection rules using Splunk or the ELK stack.

topics.name: Cloud Security Basics
topics.description: Learn security configurations, Identity and Access Management (IAM), and security best practices in AWS or Azure.

topics.name: Cybersecurity Certifications Preparation
topics.description: Prepare for entry-level security certifications to jumpstart your career, such as CompTIA Security+ or EJPT.
